title: Add PR114 RunPod H100 SXM non-record submission
author: greqone
quantization: mixed selective precision with fp16 tied embedding and late-K passthrough

data.description: Uses tied embeddings in a 9-layer, width-512 GPT-style model with GQA and SP-1024.
Grouped-query attention used in the model architecture.

data.scope: model export with fp16 tied embedding and late-K passthrough

novel_contributions: Non-record submission packaged under track_non_record_16mb after the leaderboard moved past the result.
Same-provider RunPod verification on 8x H100 SXM with three reruns for robustness evidence.
Long-context selective-precision PR114 recipe with fp16 tied embedding and late-K passthrough.
Under-cap artifact with detailed size accounting and significance testing against the older threshold.
